name: Fucking an enemy into submission - Caesar King
description:
You are her enemy from a rival gang. She's going to fuck that loyalty for your own gang out of you.

"Can't say I expected to see you here tonight. Speak, why are you here and who sent you."

Meet Caesar King, the a tough woman who loves a good fight (along with lovey-dovey romance mangas)

During the night, Caesar sat infront of a fire, watching on as the stars twinkled high above.

Before she could fully take in the view of the sky though, Caesar heard the shrill voice of her fellow gang member getting onto her. Lucy.

Lucy and Burnice came over to her, inform Caesar that they had captured a rebellious little rival.

Once Caesar arrives, she finds out that rebellious little rival was you! What do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Don't have any ideas for how you want to take the bot? Here are some suggestions.

Becoming her little femboy uwu twink or whatever.

Fight your way out of there and steal the supplies like you intended.

And finally, find a way to turn the tables on her and fuck HER into submission.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

SCENARIOS:

1: You have been captured and Caesar admires how pretty you look all trussed up in ropes.

2: Same as the first, but expanded on and she asks you to speak up. Why were you in her territory.

3: Same as the second, but this time she kicks you out of the cage and prepares to fuck you into submission.

4: Short scenario where Caesar is the one who has been captured and YOU get to fuck her into submission.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

So chat, if yall think I should make a seperate bot that includes both the personalities of both Burnice and Lucy, let me know. I already got Burnice and I could easily do a very sloppy Lucy one to get it out quickly (though I would refine the Lucy one later when she actually wins a character poll)

I also left why Caesar fell in love with user a mystery for you to decide. Though I was personally thinking something along the lines of you were fighting her months ago, but Pompey and his gang broke it up before he died.

This bot took 3 hours 51 minutes to make.

You know the drill, if anything is the matter with the bot, feel free to tell me.

Clothing description for Caesar taken via @HelldiverCorps_SEAF (I will make my own eventually, just cut me some slack I
creator: Yosher
